query:
SELECT
            activity_type::text         AS "activity_type!: String",
            COUNT(*)                    AS "count!: i64"
        FROM activities
        WHERE tenant_id          = $1
          AND occurred_at::date >= $2
          AND occurred_at::date <= $3
          AND ($4::uuid IS NULL OR performed_by = $4)
          AND ($5::text IS NULL OR activity_type::text = $5)
        GROUP BY activity_type
        ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
